headline: Is Costco Wholesale (COST) Undervalued As New Product Launches Test Its Premium Valuation?
summary: Costco Wholesale (COST) has been in focus after several consumer brands, including Laifen, Jackery and Tick Solutions Global, chose the retailer for new product launches and exclusives. This highlights ongoing merchandising activity across its warehouses. See our latest analysis for Costco Wholesale. Costco Wholesale shares closed at US$927.31, and while the stock is down about 9% on a 3 month share price basis after hitting record highs in May, the 3 year total shareholder return of about...

headline: Why China Could Become Costco's Next Membership Catalyst
summary: Costco's early Executive Membership success in China, paired with warehouse expansion, could boost fee income, shopping frequency and loyalty.

headline: Will Costco (COST) be Able to Continue High Dividend Growth?
summary: Bristol Gate Capital Partners, an investment management company, published its Q2 2026 investor letter for the “US Equity Strategy”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy lagged the S&P 500 Total Return Index in the quarter in terms of returns, but outperformed in dividend growth. Despite debate over capital cycle returns, […]
